_comment: Marketing caption banners drawn above each screenshot. Order maps to raw files 01_today, 02_history, 03_goals, 04_add_food. The app UI itself is English-only for now; these localized captions still make the store screenshots feel native per market.
en-US: Your whole day at a glance
nl-NL: Je hele dag in één oogopslag
de-DE: Dein ganzer Tag auf einen Blick
fr-FR: Toute votre journée en un coup d'œil
es-ES: Todo tu día de un vistazo
it-IT: Tutta la giornata in un colpo d'occhio
Registra il cibo in pochi secondi
ja-JP: 傾向と連続記録をチェック
あなたに合った目標設定
